description: Evaluates four core composition constraints per prompt. Unlike pure buckets, complex intentionally mixes counts, relations, and/or attributes. No support questions are used.

templates.template: Are there exactly {count_word} {object_plural} in the image?
Use only when needed as one of the four core constraints.

ucb_note: Prompt rewards are normalized to [0, 1]. Bucket score is mean prompt reward. This is the only intentionally mixed-skill bucket.
